# Drug Interaction MCP

> Drug-drug interaction checker with severity classification, polypharmacy support, RxNorm normalization

This MCP server exposes 5 tools via the Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST). It runs on Cloudflare Workers and is billed via Dodo Payments. Authenticated via `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` obtained by subscribing at `https://drug-interaction-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade`.

## Endpoint
- MCP JSON-RPC: https://drug-interaction-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp
- Health: https://drug-interaction-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/health
- Landing page: https://drug-interaction-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/
- Get API key: https://drug-interaction-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade?tier=solo

## Tools
- `check_interaction`: Check the interaction between two drugs. Severity, mechanism (when known), and source.
- `check_interactions_multi`: Pairwise interaction check across a polypharmacy list (deduped A-B/B-A, max 28 pairs).
- `normalize_drug_name`: Resolve brand or generic name to RxNorm canonical record: RxCUI, generic, brands, synonyms.
- `dose_guide`: FDA-labeled dosing guidance from DailyMed.
- `find_alternatives`: Drugs in the same ATC therapeutic class.

## Authentication
Pass `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on POST /mcp. Free tier: anonymous, 100 calls / month / IP.

## Pricing
- Free: 100 calls / month (anonymous, no signup)
- Solo $29/mo: 2,000 calls / month, 60/min
- Team $99/mo: 10,000 calls / month, 200/min, 5 team seats
- Pro $299/mo: 50,000 calls / month, 600/min, 25 team seats
Billed via Dodo Payments (merchant-of-record). Cancel anytime.

## Account management
- View account: GET https://drug-interaction-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account (Bearer)
- Rotate key: POST https://drug-interaction-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/rotate (Bearer)
- GDPR data export: GET https://drug-interaction-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/export (Bearer)
- Team management (Team+): https://drug-interaction-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/team
